subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken on 1909-02-25
subcodes.first_line: It is not a duty incumbent upon them; it is not obligatory, but if they have no special demand upon their time, the believers must be present at the meetings.... In such meetings, that is to say, the meetings which are open to the public
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @importance of community building
